name: card
description: A surface that groups related content — optional media, a heading, text, and actions. The workhorse container of most marketing sections.

variant.description: How the card separates from the page: shadow, border, or tint.

interactive.description: Whether the whole card is a link/target and reacts on hover.

a11y.contrast: Card surface preserves 4.5:1 for the text it contains in the active theme.
notes: An interactive card exposes a single clear link; nested interactive elements are avoided to prevent overlapping targets.
hover/focus states apply only when `interactive` is true.
Heading level inside the card is chosen by the surrounding document outline, not by the card.

elementor.notes: Compiles to an Elementor flex Container holding child widgets (media, heading, text, button).

mapping.variant: Style → Background/Border/Box Shadow, bound to Global Colors + elevation roles
